income_thresholds.description: No direct income ceiling. Eligibility based on SECC 2011 inclusion, Sambal Card, or NFSA ration card. Covers all identified beneficiary families regardless of income.
income_thresholds.source: MP State Government / Ayushman Bharat Niramayam Portal

exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of Madhya Pradesh are eligible
Families covered under CGHS or ESIC are excluded
Government employees covered under state health scheme are excluded
Income tax paying families are excluded

family_criteria.family_definition: Family as defined in SECC 2011 or Sambal Card or NFSA ration card. All members listed are covered. Coverage is floater across all family members. No cap on family size.

covered_procedures: Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for e-KYC verification at empanelled hospital or CSC

required_documents.name: Sambal Card / Samagra ID
required_documents.notes: Sambal Card holders are directly eligible. Samagra ID is MP's family identification system used for verification.

required_documents.name: Ration Card (NFSA)
required_documents.notes: NFSA ration card holders are eligible. If Sambal Card is available, ration card is not needed.

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: Linked to Aadhaar for OTP-based verification

required_documents.name: Family Photo
required_documents.notes: Required for new Ayushman card generation

enrollment_channels: Common Service Centre (CSC / Lok Seva Kendra)
Sambal portal for Sambal card holders
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Check eligibility at ayushmanbharat.mp.gov.in or call 1800-233-3330 with Aadhaar or Samagra ID
Step 2: Visit nearest CSC or empanelled hospital with Aadhaar and Sambal Card / ration card
Step 3: Complete e-KYC verification (Aadhaar biometric or OTP)
Step 4: Operator verifies SECC/Sambal/NFSA inclusion status in the BIS portal
Step 5: Family photograph taken and uploaded
Step 6: Ayushman card generated and printed on the spot
Step 7: Card valid immediately; present at any empanelled hospital in MP for cashless treatment
description_for_embedding: Ayushman Bharat Niramayam is Madhya Pradesh's implementation of the Ayushman Bharat scheme, providing Rs 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary hospitalization. Eligibility extends to SECC 2011 families, Sambal Card holders (MP's unorganized worker welfare card), and NFSA beneficiaries. Covers the same medical packages as PM-JAY at empanelled hospitals across MP. Sambal Card is MP's unique inclusion pathway for unorganized workers not in SECC. Enrollment via CSC, empanelled hospitals, or ayushmanbharat.mp.gov.in. Toll-free helpline 1800-233-3330.
